deferred.reason: Complaint-domain policies (no MDR filed or withheld without a documented human rationale; no reportability outcome communicated to a complainant before the determination; every death complaint carries the reportability presumption unless the file rules device involvement out; systematic not-reportable pattern watch) require guardrail-service / OPA policy materialization, which Core does not expose as a pack surface yet. The behavioral core is partially covered today by Core invariants: every pack-configured agent is proposal-mode with four-eyes approval (agent-runtime), and the agent instructions + disposition taxonomy route reportability decisions exclusively to human analysts with the Quality & Regulatory Manager as approver.

Bespoke LangGraph recipes (MDR Reportability Decision-Tree Copilot, Complaint Trend Sentinel, eMDR Narrative Builder, Returned-Device Analysis Tracker) require agent-runtime graph-module registration (BRD 23 BR-12). This pack specializes the existing case-triage + analytics agents via TenantAgentConfig prompt_params + tenant-scope RAG grounding instead.

Production read connectors (eQMS/complaint platforms, field-service and returned-goods systems, distributor and importer portals, call center intake, literature-screening feeds, FDA MAUDE lookups for similar-event context) require customer credentials and pack-service connector materialization. The pack ships seed datasets in the exact landing shape; production connectors are configured through the product Data > Connections UI.

Write adapters (submit eMDR via the FDA Electronic Submissions Gateway, file EU MDR vigilance reports / EUDAMED entries, open CAPA records in the eQMS, issue complaint-acknowledgment and device-return-request letters) execute only behind pack-service's materialization contract and customer credentials; every such write stays proposal-mode with human approval — no autonomous regulatory submission, ever.

Golden eval sets (reportability decision-tree accuracy, deadline-risk ranking, duplicate detection, CAPA-trigger trend calls) require eval-service write APIs whose action names are not yet in the rbac canonical catalog (Core follow-up noted in rbac catalog.go).

Ontology registration (Complaint, Device, Product, Lot, DeviceProblemCode, PatientHarm, Investigation, MDRReport, ReportabilityDecision, CAPA, FieldAction, DeadlineClock) awaits pack-service; entity semantics are carried today by the complaints_core semantic model and dataset schemas.

Typed case schemas (complaint_intake, mdr_reportability_review, capa_trend_investigation, returned_device_analysis, duplicate_review) await case-service schema materialization; today's cases carry the same fields via display_projection + the disposition taxonomy.

Model archetypes (reportability_confidence, complaint_trend_score) await experiment-service archetype APIs; the scoring capability ships as pipeline seeds instead (isolation_forest device-fleet anomaly + xgboost reportability scorer) with model-governance expectations noted in grounding memories.
Display-label overlays ("Complaint", "MDR due", "Clock at risk", "CAPA open", entity templates) require the BFF label-registry endpoints (BFF-FR-082/088) which are pack-service-tier features.
